testimonials.name: Ana Horvat
testimonials.text: Absolutely amazing experience! The guides were knowledgeable and friendly. The views from Biokovo were breathtaking. Highly recommended!

testimonials.name: Marco Rossi
testimonials.text: Best hiking tour I've ever done. Professional, safe, and incredibly beautiful. The whole team was fantastic!

testimonials.name: Sarah Johnson
testimonials.text: Outstanding! The sunset tour was magical. Worth every penny. Can't wait to come back with my family!

testimonials.name: Petra Schmidt
testimonials.text: Professional guides, perfect organization, stunning scenery. Safari Makarska exceeded all expectations!
